source: Smelling Salts Review — extracted from conversation history lines 77-78, 81, 93-94
name: The Three-Legged Stool — Maven Ecosystem Architecture
description: The Three-Legged Stool is the foundational architecture of the Maven ecosystem. A three-legged stool cannot wobble. Two legs and it falls. The three legs together form the complete support structure Ruby Red needs to move from financial survival to generational prosperity. A fourth pillar (Union Boss) was added in Grace Persistence Architecture v5.0, making the stool a table.
north_star_alignment: Ruby Red's problems are not one-dimensional. She needs immediate cash-flow relief (Corner Banker), community connection and mutual aid (Big Mama/Maven), and long-term credit rebuilding (Pulse). No single leg is sufficient. The stool works because all three legs bear weight simultaneously.

leg_1.name: Maven — Community, Hand-Ups, Daily Supports
leg_1.primary_function: Community connection, mutual aid, AI companionship via Grace, daily supports, credit support
key_features: Grace AI Concierge (always-on companion)
Big Mama Network (local community reconnection)
Toilet Paper Delivery (physical proof-of-presence)
Song Studio / Ruby Anthem (emotional entry point)
Maven Moments (community storytelling)
Good Neighbor Barter System
Village Hands / HandUps / Make a Wish
Scam Alerts and Protection Layer
leg_1.pricing: Free tier includes Grace + 10 universal services. Paid tiers: $3.75/week

leg_2.name: Corner Banker / Money Up — Micro-Funding, Cash-Flow Relief
leg_2.product: Corner Banker of Old / Money Up
leg_2.primary_function: Micro-funding, cash-flow relief, instant-access liquidity tools, Need Milk Money (NMM)
key_features: Need Milk Money ($25-50 advance, no interest, no shame)
Vampire Slayer (subscription audit — $348/year average savings)
Fee Fighter (hidden fee identification and dispute)
Bill Tracker (proactive payment reminders)
Budget Builder (income vs. expense tracking)
NSF Prevention (Grace catches fees before they hit)

leg_3.name: Pulse — Credit Rebuilding, Financial Intelligence
leg_3.primary_function: Credit rebuilding, bureau reporting, financial insights, Dignity Score, economic mobility
key_features: Dignity Score (alternative credit scoring that rewards responsible behavior)
Rent Reporting (positive rent payments reported to credit bureaus)
Debt Snowball (AI-optimized debt repayment strategy)
Credit Bureau Reporting (building credit history from scratch)
Me Inc. (treating Ruby's household as a small business)
Stage of Life Agent (adapting financial strategy to Ruby's life stage)

fourth_pillar.name: Union Boss — Data Sovereignty, Collective Bargaining
fourth_pillar.description: The fourth pillar that makes the stool a table. The Union Boss represents collective power — data sovereignty, cooperative phone negotiation, and the principle that more members = better rates = more members.
key_features: Cooperative Phone Negotiation (1,000 Rubies = bargaining power)
Maven Data Cooperative (Ruby's data used for collective benefit)
Puppet Strings Report (financial transparency tool)
Bullshit Detector (predatory offer identification)

how_the_legs_work_together.example_scenario: Ruby joins Maven through the Toilet Paper Trojan Horse (Leg 1). Grace builds trust over 14 days. Grace introduces Vampire Slayer — saves Ruby $29/month in forgotten subscriptions (Leg 2). Grace introduces Rent Reporting — Ruby's on-time rent payments start building her credit score (Leg 3). Grace introduces Cooperative Phone Negotiation — Ruby's phone bill drops $35/month (Pillar 4). In 90 days, Ruby's net financial position has improved by $1,000+.
interdependencies: Leg 1 (Maven) provides the entry point and trust foundation
Leg 2 (Corner Banker) provides immediate financial wins that prove Maven's value
Pillar 4 (Union Boss) provides collective power that no individual leg can achieve
